fetchStatus.officialNote: Neil Paine MLB-WAR-data-historical mlb-elo-latest.csv. Seasonal/manual feed — not actively updating into the 2026 season. Last GitHub commit on mlb-elo-latest.csv: 2025-05-10. Settled scores through 2025-05-09; file dates through 2025-09-28 (includes unsettled rows). Stronger/more current than the prior 538 freeze (settled ~2023-06-20), but not a live 2026 pipeline.
